provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, massive female reptilian alien with black-green scales and ritual scarification patterns carved into the scales of her shoulders and arms, a tall prominent crest ridge with a hammered iron crest-cap, red eyes burning with intensity, enormous powerful tail, wearing ornate master-forged plate armor in dark iron rather than bronze with crimson enamel inlays on the chest depicting battle scenes, a massive two-handed cleaver-axe weapon mag-locked to her back, honor tokens covering the entire belt like a chainmail skirt, her armor is unique — no other champion has these patterns
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

judgment.explanation: Veshan faction. Forged material vocabulary with overlapping scales, dark bronze plate, leather underpadding. Martial culture expressed through gear.
